item.title: 评估就是新的 PRD，Expedia AI 负责人谈 VB Transform 2026
item.summary: “The new PRD are the evals,” Xavi Amatriain, Expedia Group’s first chief AI and data officer, told the VB Transform 2026 audience last week in Menlo Park. “So basically, you encode what you want the product to do through your evals, which might include red teaming evals and all kinds of other things, which already have
